rationale: No qualitative shift in the Russia-Ukraine war or EU affairs; the US-Iran deal remains unresolved and Israel continues strikes on Lebanon, keeping energy price uncertainty elevated for Polish consumers.

top_events.title: Iran claims deal with US near, Israel strikes Lebanon
top_events.summary: A US-Iran deal could lower global energy prices benefiting Poland, but Israeli strikes on Lebanon and warnings that 'lots can go wrong' keep uncertainty high. No concluded deal yet — continuation of prior baseline.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends AI tools over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: US federal restrictions on AI access for foreign nationals could indirectly affect Polish tech sector and researchers relying on US AI tools, but impact remains limited and indirect.

top_events.title: US kills Tren de Aragua gang leader in airstrike
top_events.summary: Distant US domestic security action with no direct relevance to Poland's daily life or regional security.
